name: Multi-store balance — sum quantity = totally on hand
action_steps: Run balance_validator: за всеки product изчисли SUM(quantity) over stores
expected_result: За всеки product: SUM(per-store quantity) = global view total
smoke_sql: SELECT product_id, COUNT(DISTINCT store_id) AS stores, SUM(quantity) AS total FROM inventory GROUP BY product_id HAVING total < 0 LIMIT 5
